title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Walker Chandiok Capital India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Walker Chandiok Capital India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Walker Chandiok Capital India in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walker Chandiok Capital India:
Walker Chandiok Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok Capital India!
